directive.title: FS-VIZ-MOB-002: Mobile Touch Interaction & Gesture Support for Charts

auditor.summary: The build implements the gesture layer structure correctly with passive listeners, swipe logic, and modal components. However, two HIGH-severity issues from the prior audit remain unresolved: pinch-to-zoom scale calculation is still broken (scale always ~1.0), and long-press still uses mock data instead of actual chart data points. These directly violate acceptance criteria #2 and #4. Additionally, the cloneElement approach for injecting gesture props into Recharts components is architecturally incorrect. The build is recoverable but requires fixes to the core gesture logic before it can pass.

top_issues.description: Pinch-to-zoom scale calculation still broken: initialDistanceRef is set in handlePointerDown, but pointer positions are updated in handlePointerMove before distance calculation, making currentDistance approximately equal to initialDistance on every frame. Scale always ~1.0.
Long-press handler still generates mock data instead of using actual chart data point from touch coordinates. This violates acceptance criterion #4.

ChartContent uses React.cloneElement to inject 'gestureZoomDomain' and 'gestureActiveSeriesIndex' as props on arbitrary children. Recharts XAxis expects 'domain' as a direct prop, not a custom prop on wrapper elements. This will not affect Recharts rendering.
